/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/void_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/void_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_server.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_server.dir/controllers/connection_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_server.dir/middleware/auth_middleware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_server.dir/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_server.dir/home/roma/Desktop/server/shared/utils/utils.cpp.o -o void_server
